ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2003 Assigned To Master Calendar

Motion To Participate In Early Settlement Program In Lieu Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-25-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant's Motion to Participate in Early Settlement Program in Lieu of Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. A Jury Trial Date of 10/6/2003 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206 is ordered set. A Mandatory Settlement Conference is ordered set on 9/17/2003 at 9:00 AM, in Department 602. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court ordered parties to contact BASF's ESP Program for further instruction. Moving party to submit a proposed order. Proceedings reported by: Irene Burns. (212)
